garchomp.name: Garchomp
garchomp.description: Garchomp, the final evolution of Gible, is a Dragon/Ground type Pokémon. It's incredibly fast and can fly. Garchomp is known for its shark-like appearance and its ferocity in battle.

hippowdon.name: Hippowdon
hippowdon.description: Hippowdon, the evolved form of Hippopotas, is a Ground type Pokémon. It's large and powerful, with a massive mouth. Hippowdon creates sandstorms by expelling sand from its body and is known for its territorial nature.

corviknight.name: Corviknight
corviknight.description: Corviknight, the final evolution of Rookidee, is a Flying/Steel type Pokémon. It's known for its imposing armor and its role as a flying taxi in the Galar region. Corviknight is strong and loyal, with a commanding presence.

basculegion (male).name: Basculegion (Male)
basculegion (male).description: Basculegion, a Water/Ghost type Pokémon, is an evolution of Basculin. It's known for its ghostly nature and its ability to swim long distances. Basculegion is often associated with the souls of departed Pokémon.

mimikyu.name: Mimikyu
mimikyu.description: Mimikyu, a Ghost/Fairy type Pokémon, wears a cloth to look like Pikachu to be loved by people. It's said that seeing its true form under the cloth can be dangerous. Mimikyu is known for its lonely and sad nature.

aegislash (shield forme).name: Aegislash (Shield Forme)
aegislash (shield forme).description: Aegislash, the final evolution of Honedge, is a Steel/Ghost type Pokémon. It can change forms between Shield and Blade, altering its offensive and defensive capabilities. Aegislash is known for its ability to use both tactics and strategy in battle.

grimmsnarl.name: Grimmsnarl
grimmsnarl.description: Grimmsnarl, the final evolution of Impidimp, is a Dark/Fairy type Pokémon. It has a menacing appearance and can manipulate its hair-like tentacles in battle. Grimmsnarl is known for its strength and its intimidating presence.

swampert.name: Swampert
swampert.description: Swampert, l'evoluzione finale di Mudkip, è un Pokémon di tipo Acqua/Terra. È molto potente e ha una grande forza fisica. Swampert può prevedere tempeste usando la sua pinna e proteggere il suo territorio.

gyarados.name: Gyarados
gyarados.description: Gyarados, the evolved form of Magikarp, is a Water/Flying type Pokémon. It's incredibly powerful and aggressive, known for its destructive rampages. Gyarados can unleash powerful water and dragon-type moves.

pelipper.name: Pelipper
pelipper.description: Pelipper, l'evoluzione di Wingull, è un Pokémon di tipo Acqua/Volante. Ha un grande becco che usa per catturare prede e trasportare oggetti. Pelipper è spesso visto galleggiare sull'acqua o volare vicino al mare.

whimsicott.name: Whimsicott
whimsicott.description: Whimsicott, the evolved form of Cottonee, is a Grass/Fairy type Pokémon. It can manipulate its fluffy fur to create cottony clouds, which it uses to hide. Whimsicott is playful and mischievous, often playing pranks.

scizor.name: Scizor
scizor.description: Scizor, the evolved form of Scyther, is a Bug/Steel type Pokémon. It has a metallic body and pincer-like hands. Scizor is known for its strength and speed, and its body reflects light to blend into its surroundings.

umbreon.name: Umbreon
umbreon.description: Umbreon, another evolution of Eevee, is a Dark type Pokémon. It has glowing, yellow rings on its body and a mysterious aura. Umbreon is known for its endurance and its ability to blend into the darkness.

hydreigon.name: Hydreigon
hydreigon.description: Hydreigon, the final evolution of Deino, is a Dark/Dragon type Pokémon. It has three heads and is extremely violent. Hydreigon attacks anything that moves and is known as a brutal predator.

primarina.name: Primarina
primarina.description: Primarina, the final evolution of Popplio, is a Water/Fairy type Pokémon. It's known for its beautiful singing voice, which can control water balloons to attack in battle. Primarina is graceful and powerful, captivating both allies and opponents.

dragapult.name: Dragapult
dragapult.description: Dragapult, the final evolution of Dreepy, is a Dragon/Ghost type Pokémon. It resembles a stealth bomber and can launch Dreepy like missiles. Dragapult is known for its speed and its unique method of attack.

volcarona.name: Volcarona
volcarona.description: Volcarona, the evolved form of Larvesta, is a Bug/Fire type Pokémon. It has large, fiery wings and is known as the "Sun Pokémon." Volcarona can release a flurry of fiery scales and is revered in legend.

greninja.name: Greninja
greninja.description: Greninja, the final evolution of Froakie, is a Water/Dark type Pokémon. It's extremely fast and can compress water into sharp shurikens. Greninja has a unique battle bond ability, transforming its appearance in battle.

mamoswine.name: Mamoswine
mamoswine.description: Mamoswine, the evolved form of Piloswine, is an Ice/Ground type Pokémon. It's large and resembles a woolly mammoth. Mamoswine is known for its strength and its ability to survive in cold, harsh environments.

vanilluxe.name: Vanilluxe
vanilluxe.description: Vanilluxe, the final evolution of Vanillite, is an Ice type Pokémon. It resembles a double-scoop ice cream cone and can create blizzards. Vanilluxe is known for its two heads, which can blast icy wind.

blaziken.name: Blaziken
blaziken.description: Blaziken, l'evoluzione finale di Torchic, è un Pokémon di tipo Fuoco/Lotta. Ha potenti gambe e può scatenare intense fiamme. Blaziken è temuto per la sua potenza in battaglia e la sua velocità fulminea.

empoleon.name: Empoleon
empoleon.description: Empoleon, the final evolution of Piplup, is a Water/Steel type Pokémon. It resembles an emperor penguin with a trident-like crest. Empoleon is known for its commanding presence and its ability to slice through icebergs.

milotic.name: Milotic
milotic.description: Milotic, the evolved form of Feebas, is a Water type Pokémon known for its incredible beauty and grace. It's said to be the most beautiful of all Pokémon and has the power to calm emotions and end strife.

azumarill.name: Azumarill
azumarill.description: Azumarill, the evolved form of Marill, is a Water/Fairy type Pokémon. It has a more robust and rabbit-like appearance. Azumarill's long ears are sensitive to sound, and it has a powerful, ball-like tail.

gallade.name: Gallade
gallade.description: Gallade, an evolution of Kirlia and a male counterpart to Gardevoir, is a Psychic/Fighting type Pokémon. It's known for its skill with its blade-like elbows and its sense of chivalry. Gallade is a master of courtesy and swordsmanship.

vivillon.name: Vivillon
vivillon.description: Vivillon, the final evolution of Scatterbug, is a Bug/Flying type Pokémon. It has colorful wings with unique patterns that vary based on its environment. Vivillon is known for its beauty and its ability to affect the climate.

vaporeon.name: Vaporeon
vaporeon.description: Vaporeon, one of Eevee's evolutions, is a Water type Pokémon. It resembles an aquatic creature and can blend into water. Vaporeon's cells are similar to water molecules, allowing it to melt into the water.

gengar.name: Gengar
gengar.description: Gengar, the final evolution of Gastly, is a Ghost/Poison type Pokémon. It has a menacing appearance and is known for its mischievous nature. Gengar can absorb heat, leaving its surroundings colder, and enjoys casting eerie shadows.

sylveon.name: Sylveon
sylveon.description: Sylveon, a Fairy type Pokémon, is an evolution of Eevee. It's known for its charming appearance and ribbon-like feelers, which it uses to calm and soothe opponents. Sylveon symbolizes the power of affection and care.

sneasler.name: Sneasler
sneasler.description: Sneasler, a Poison/Fighting type Pokémon, is an evolution of Sneasel. It's agile and has a sleek, ninja-like appearance. Sneasler is known for its stealth and its proficiency in climbing and leaping.

excadrill.name: Excadrill
excadrill.description: Excadrill, the evolved form of Drilbur, is a Ground/Steel type Pokémon. It resembles a mole and can drill through the earth at high speeds. Excadrill is known for its powerful digging claws and its ability to burrow deep underground.

toxapex.name: Toxapex
toxapex.description: Toxapex, the evolved form of Mareanie, is a Poison/Water type Pokémon. It has a hard shell and twelve legs. Toxapex is known for its defensive capabilities and its ability to release potent toxins.

araquanid.name: Araquanid
araquanid.description: Araquanid, the evolved form of Dewpider, is a Water/Bug type Pokémon. It has a larger water bubble and a more menacing appearance. Araquanid is known for its hunting skills and its care for its offspring.

abomasnow.name: Abomasnow
abomasnow.description: Abomasnow, the evolved form of Snover, is a Grass/Ice type Pokémon. It's larger and resembles a snow-covered tree. Abomasnow can summon blizzards and is known as the "Frost Tree Pokémon."

ditto.name: Ditto
ditto.description: Ditto, a Normal type Pokémon, can transform into any other Pokémon or object. It's a blob-like creature that can mimic the appearance and abilities of its counterparts. Ditto's transformation ability makes it a unique and versatile Pokémon.

incineroar.name: Incineroar
incineroar.description: Incineroar, the final evolution of Litten, is a Fire/Dark type Pokémon. It resembles a wrestler and has a fiery belt. Incineroar loves to battle and show off, and it can unleash devastating flame attacks.

serperior.name: Serperior
serperior.description: Serperior, the final evolution of Snivy, is a Grass type Pokémon. It's regal and majestic, with a commanding presence. Serperior can constrict opponents with its powerful body.

snorlax.name: Snorlax
snorlax.description: Snorlax, a Normal type Pokémon, is known for its immense size and tendency to sleep in inconvenient locations. It's incredibly strong and can eat massive amounts of food. Snorlax only wakes up to eat.

tyranitar.name: Tyranitar
tyranitar.description: Tyranitar, the final evolution of Larvitar, is a Rock/Dark type Pokémon. It's incredibly powerful and can change the landscape. Tyranitar is known for its destructive nature and its ability to summon storms.

skarmory.name: Skarmory
skarmory.description: Skarmory, a Steel/Flying type Pokémon, has a body encased in hard, metallic armor. It's known for its powerful wings and can fly at high speeds. Skarmory's feathers are sharp and can be used as blades.

dragonite.name: Dragonite
dragonite.description: Dragonite, the final evolution of Dratini, is a Dragon/Flying type Pokémon. It's incredibly powerful and kind-hearted. Dragonite can fly faster than sound and is known for its intelligence and caring nature.

kleavor.name: Kleavor
kleavor.description: Kleavor, a Bug/Rock type Pokémon, is an evolution of Scyther. It has stone axes for arms and a rugged, imposing appearance. Kleavor is known for its ferocity in battle and its ability to cleave through anything with its arms.

hatterene.name: Hatterene
hatterene.description: Hatterene, the final evolution of Hatenna, is a Psychic/Fairy type Pokémon. It resembles a witch and is known for its silent nature and powerful psychic abilities. Hatterene is often found in quiet, secluded places.

conkeldurr.name: Conkeldurr
conkeldurr.description: Conkeldurr, the final evolution of Timburr, is a Fighting type Pokémon. It wields two concrete pillars and is known for its immense power. Conkeldurr is respected by many for its mastery in construction.

overqwil.name: Overqwil
overqwil.description: Overqwil, a Dark/Poison type Pokémon, is an evolution of Qwilfish. It's larger and more menacing, with an appearance resembling a sea mine. Overqwil is known for its spikes and its ability to launch them at enemies.

vileplume.name: Vileplume
vileplume.description: Vileplume, the final form of Oddish, is a Grass/Poison type Pokémon. It has a large, rafflesia-like flower on its head, which releases a toxic pollen. Vileplume's flower is the largest among all Grass type Pokémon and can be used for various powerful attacks.

clefable.name: Clefable
clefable.description: Clefable, the evolved form of Clefairy, is a Fairy type Pokémon. It has a more elegant and mystical appearance. Known for its quiet and reclusive nature, Clefable is highly sensitive to sound and can use its wings to skip lightly as if walking on air.

scolipede.name: Scolipede
scolipede.description: Scolipede, the final evolution of Venipede, is a Bug/Poison type Pokémon. It's large and fast, with long, horn-like antennae. Scolipede is aggressive and tramples anything in its path.

espeon.name: Espeon
espeon.description: Espeon, an evolution of Eevee, is a Psychic type Pokémon. It's sleek and cat-like, with a forked tail and a jewel on its forehead. Espeon is highly intelligent and can predict its opponent's moves.

rhyperior.name: Rhyperior
rhyperior.description: Rhyperior, the evolved form of Rhydon, is a Ground/Rock type Pokémon. It's larger and more armored, with a powerful drill-like horn. Rhyperior is known for its strength and its ability to shoot rocks from its hands.

mudsdale.name: Mudsdale
mudsdale.description: Mudsdale, the evolved form of Mudbray, is a Ground type Pokémon. It resembles a draft horse and is known for its incredible strength and endurance. Mudsdale's legs are coated in protective mud.

metagross.name: Metagross
metagross.description: Metagross, the final evolution of Beldum, is a Steel/Psychic type Pokémon. It's formed by two Metang joining together and has four brains. Metagross is incredibly intelligent and powerful, known for its tactical thinking.

tsareena.name: Tsareena
tsareena.description: Tsareena, the final evolution of Bounsweet, is a Grass type Pokémon. It's known for its regal and powerful kicks. Tsareena has a commanding presence and can emit a powerful fragrance.

mega delphox.name: Mega Delphox
mega delphox.description:
Mega Evolution has greatly enhanced Delphox’s psychic abilities, giving it a mysterious and dazzling battle style. Two enchanted branches float at its sides, moving as if alive under its control. Mega Delphox rides atop a large burning branch, further mesmerizing its opponents, who are left bewildered by the display. While its foes falter in confusion, Mega Delphox remains calm and composed, landing precise, devastating blows.

Its signature fighting style involves combining its magic flames with the fire from its mouth. The floating branches release autonomous bursts of fire that distract and confuse opponents, before merging with Delphox’s own breath to create a colossal fireball. This searing attack engulfs its targets completely, incinerating them in a display of both elegance and destructive power.

mega dragonite.name: Mega Dragonite
mega dragonite.description:
Mega Dragonite is distinguished by the large, white wings sprouting from its head that double as antennae, as well as the glowing ball at the end of its tail—a trait reminiscent of its standard form. Through Mega Evolution, its flight ability is drastically enhanced, allowing it to soar faster and farther than ever before.

Mega Dragonite’s most notable trait, however, is its kindness, which becomes even more pronounced after Mega Evolution. In battle, it believes that ending fights swiftly is the greatest kindness it can show its opponent. With a gentle smile, it launches overwhelming attacks to conclude battles quickly.

Despite its immense power, Mega Dragonite will never ignore someone in distress. Even in the middle of a fierce battle, it will stop and rush to help those in need, embodying both strength and compassion in equal measure.

mega meganium.name: Mega Meganium
mega meganium.description:
Mega Evolution has triggered rapid growth in Meganium, enlarging its body and increasing the number of flowers around its neck to four. These massive blossoms absorb sunlight and store vast amounts of solar energy, allowing Mega Meganium to unleash powerful Solar Beams instantaneously. Its feelers are highly sensitive, capable of detecting changes in the weather to find ideal spots for photosynthesis.

The four flowers release a fragrant substance born from condensed solar power. In small amounts, this aroma soothes emotions and calms those nearby — but inhaling too much can cause agitation or dizziness.

Mega Meganium’s fighting style has grown bolder with its transformation. When Solar Beam proves ineffective, it uses its strengthened body to crush opponents underfoot. Confident and radiant, it embodies both elegance and overwhelming natural strength, standing as a living testament to the true power of sunlight.

mega greninja.name: Mega Greninja
mega greninja.description:
The power of Mega Evolution has sharpened Greninja’s reflexes to extraordinary levels. Unlike its usual ninja-like stealth, Mega Greninja boldly reveals itself, provoking opponents into striking first. With its enhanced speed and heightened senses, it detects their movements instantly and counters before they can land a blow. Its confidence in victory is so great that it no longer hides—it overwhelms foes in plain sight.

Mega Greninja also fights in a spectacularly unique way: it clings upside down to a massive, rapidly spinning Water Shuriken, created from a special gel-like membrane secreted by its body. This colossal weapon distracts and intimidates opponents, while Mega Greninja immobilizes them with its long tongue before finishing the battle with swift, decisive strikes from its gigantic shuriken.

mega victreebel.name: Mega Victreebel
mega victreebel.description:
The volume of this Pokémon’s acid has increased due to Mega Evolution, filling its mouth. If it’s not careful, the acid will overflow and spill out. Its body has swollen as a result of Mega Evolution, and even the leaves on top of its head have grown larger.

Mega Victreebel flaps the leaves on its sides and moves its heavy, bloated body by bouncing around. When it opens its enormous mouth, it unleashes a devastating Sludge Bomb, spreading toxic acid everywhere.

Despite its efforts, it has so much acid that even clamping its mouth shut isn’t enough to contain it. To avoid spilling, Mega Victreebel wraps its own vines tightly around its throat, restraining the constant overflow. When deflated, it briefly resembles its original form, but the immense pressure of its acid soon swells its body again.

mega chimecho.name: Mega Chimecho
mega chimecho.description: In this form, Chimecho is flanked by six dangling copies. Mega Chimecho always waves and flutters, even when no wind is blowing. When Chimecho lets out a cry, the copies join in and resonate with it. As these cries overlap and reverberate, they form an intense sound-wave attack.

mega feraligatr.name: Mega Feraligatr
mega feraligatr.description:
Mega Evolution has caused Feraligatr’s dorsal fin to grow to an enormous size, granting it both offensive and defensive power. Combining the strength of its arms with the force of this massive fin, Mega Feraligatr’s bite is said to be ten times more powerful than before. Even opponents far too large for its original form can now be crushed to bits in its jaws.

The huge fin isn’t just for attack—it serves multiple vital roles. Mega Feraligatr can fold the fin forward to shield its head from incoming blows, drastically reducing physical damage. It also acts as a natural cooling system, allowing the Pokémon to vent excess heat generated by the intense energy of Mega Evolution.

Interestingly, the shape of Mega Feraligatr’s dorsal fin bears a striking resemblance to Totodile’s head, leading many to nickname it the “Totodile Mask.” Some researchers theorize that Totodile’s head structure is optimized for biting strength, and Mega Evolution may have subconsciously reshaped Feraligatr to mirror its younger form’s ideal anatomy. Whether coincidence or design, this transformation has turned Mega Feraligatr into the ultimate embodiment of primal ferocity and precision.

mega chesnaught.name: Mega Chesnaught
mega chesnaught.description:
Mega Evolution channels immense energy into Chesnaught’s outer shell, dramatically reinforcing its defenses. The fur across its body thickens into an impact-absorbing cloak, allowing it to withstand devastating blows while maintaining a calm, steadfast spirit. No matter the attack, Mega Chesnaught remains levelheaded, confident in its ability to endure.

Its shield-like shoulder armor has also transformed into a deadly weapon. When removed, spikes extend from the plate to form a massive axe-like blade with a long handle. Though its sheer weight makes one-handed use impossible, Mega Chesnaught’s immense strength allows it to grip the weapon with both hands and wield it with remarkable precision. By smashing its foes with this brutal weapon, Mega Chesnaught turns its legendary defense into overwhelming offense.

mega eelektross.name: Mega Eelektross
mega eelektross.description:
Mega Evolution has dramatically enhanced the yellow electricity-generating organs on Eelektross’s torso and arms, vastly increasing their output. In addition to generating immense electrical power, these organs now produce electrified mucus, which Mega Eelektross can shape into gelatinous, Eelektrik-like appendages at the ends of its arms. This transformation also allows it to float continuously through the air using electromagnetic force.

These living constructs, known among researchers as the “false Eelektrik”, assist Mega Eelektross in battle and movement. The left one is nicknamed Eeleftrik and the right one Eerightrik. They stabilize its movement underwater and allow it to swim nearly twice as fast as before. Most of the electricity Mega Eelektross produces flows into these extensions, strong enough to paralyze even massive Pokémon like Wailord.

When Mega Evolution ends, the false Eelektrik dissolve back into liquid form, vanishing completely. However, this electrified mucus can be preserved by freezing, retaining its strange jelly-like consistency. Some claim that preserved Mega Eelektross mucus has applications in cosmetic treatments and muscle-toning regimens, though there’s little scientific proof of its effectiveness.

mega hawlucha.name: Mega Hawlucha
mega hawlucha.description:
Mega Evolution has pumped up the muscles across Hawlucha’s entire body, greatly enhancing both its Attack and Defense. With its newfound bulk, Mega Hawlucha can endure countless hits while flexing its strength to intimidate opponents.

After luring its foe into attacking, it retaliates with sharp counters that leave the opponent flinching, before diving down with its signature Flying Press to secure victory. By spinning its body mid-dive, Mega Hawlucha builds momentum, making the impact even more devastating.

Mega Hawlucha is also a flamboyant entertainer, constantly showing off to its opponents, its Trainer, and even the crowd. It spreads its wings wide and raises its arms high, proudly displaying its beauty and muscular chest. Whereas its regular form sometimes got distracted while showboating, Mega Evolution has given it the confidence and durability to perform again and again without losing focus.

mega emboar.name: Mega Emboar
mega emboar.description:
Mega Evolution has greatly increased Emboar’s size and muscle mass, transforming it into a powerhouse of fire and fury. Its blazing beard now burns even hotter, spreading across its upper body like a suit of flaming armor. From its palms, Mega Emboar channels pure fire energy, shaping it into a massive, serpentine spear of flame to strike down opponents in battle.

Mega Emboar’s emotions surge uncontrollably as a result of Mega Evolution, making it bold yet reckless. Once it enters a fight, it refuses to back down and will challenge any foe it sees. While it often acts on impulse, it possesses a deep sense of honor—if an ally is in danger, it will rush to their aid without hesitation, even at the risk of its own life.

Its physical strength and fiery spirit are directly linked: the higher Mega Emboar’s morale rises, the more fiercely its flames burn. When fully ignited, the tip of its flame spear can reach temperatures of 18,000°F (≈10,000°C), scorching everything in its path. Mega Emboar embodies raw passion and unstoppable power, a blazing warrior who fights with both might and heart.

mega malamar.name: Mega Malamar
mega malamar.description:
Mega Evolution has caused Malamar’s brain to swell dramatically, granting it a massive boost in psychic power. This energy overflows from its body in the form of a vivid, glowing light that enhances its hypnotic abilities to terrifying extremes. With a mere glance, Mega Malamar can overwrite the personality or even the memories of its victims, reshaping them into entirely different people.

Its glowing, undulating tendrils not only release waves of Psycho Power but also detect and interpret the emotions of those nearby. Mega Malamar prefers to fight with ruthless efficiency, calmly analyzing every detail of the battle with its heightened intelligence.

However, its arrogance has also grown. It sees even its own Trainer as nothing more than a pawn. Should it disagree with an order, Mega Malamar has been known to immediately hypnotize its Trainer into submission, making it one of the most dangerous Pokémon to handle.

Recently, reports have emerged of Mega Malamar appearing in Lumiose City, allegedly using its hypnotic powers on citizens. This sudden rise in sightings has been linked to mysterious social media videos and a surge in popularity for the Pokémon across official channels.

lopunny.name: Lopunny
lopunny.description: Lopunny, the evolved form of Buneary, is a Normal type Pokémon. It's more confident and has a sophisticated appearance. Lopunny is known for its elegance and its powerful, swift kicks.

aerodactyl.name: Aerodactyl
aerodactyl.description: Aerodactyl, a Rock/Flying type Pokémon, is a prehistoric Pokémon resurrected from a fossil. It resembles a pterosaur and is known for its ferocity and ability to fly at high speeds. Aerodactyl's jaws are incredibly powerful.

kommo-o.name: Kommo-o
kommo-o.description: Kommo-o, the final evolution of Jangmo-o, is a Dragon/Fighting type Pokémon. It's covered in glittering scales and is known as the "scaly champion." Kommo-o is revered for its power and its noble heart.

mawile.name: Mawile
mawile.description: Mawile, a Steel/Fairy type Pokémon, has a deceptive appearance with a huge set of jaws on the back of its head. It lures opponents in with its cute face and then bites with its massive jaws. Mawile is cunning and tough in battle.

oranguru.name: Oranguru
oranguru.description: Oranguru, a Normal/Psychic type Pokémon, resembles an orangutan. It's intelligent and can use tools in battle. Oranguru is often found deep in forests, meditating and thinking.

hawlucha.name: Hawlucha
hawlucha.description: Hawlucha, a Fighting/Flying type Pokémon, is known for its wrestling-style moves and aerial acrobatics. It's highly agile and uses its small size to outmaneuver opponents. Hawlucha is popular among fans of Pokémon battles for its flashy techniques.

simisear.name: Simisear
simisear.description: Simisear, the evolved form of Pansear, is a Fire type Pokémon. It's more mischievous and has a fiery personality. Simisear is known for its ability to shoot fireballs from its tail.

scrafty.name: Scrafty
scrafty.description: Scrafty, the evolved form of Scraggy, is a Dark/Fighting type Pokémon. It has a mohawk and a more pronounced 'trouser' skin. Scrafty is known for its toughness and can hold its own in a fight with powerful kicks and punches.

kangaskhan.name: Kangaskhan
kangaskhan.description: Kangaskhan, a Normal type Pokémon, is protective of its young, which it carries in its pouch. It's known for its maternal instincts and powerful attacks. Kangaskhan can be aggressive if it perceives a threat to its child.

gliscor.name: Gliscor
gliscor.description: Gliscor, the evolved form of Gligar, is a Ground/Flying type Pokémon. It glides silently and is known for its ability to detect prey from the air. Gliscor is nocturnal and uses its tail like a stinger.

chandelure.name: Chandelure
chandelure.description: Chandelure, the final evolution of Litwick, is a Ghost/Fire type Pokémon. It resembles a chandelier and can absorb a person's spirit, leaving the body behind. Chandelure's flames are hypnotic and eerie.

decidueye.name: Decidueye
decidueye.description: Decidueye, the final evolution of Rowlet, is a Grass/Ghost type Pokémon. It resembles an archer and can shoot its quills like arrows. Decidueye can hide its presence completely, striking from the shadows without warning.

staraptor.name: Staraptor
staraptor.description: Staraptor, the final evolution of Starly, is a Normal/Flying type Pokémon. It's known for its powerful flying abilities and its fierce nature. Staraptor has a distinctive crest and is a formidable predator in the sky.

chimecho.name: Chimecho
chimecho.description: Chimecho, a Psychic type Pokémon, emits cries that sound like wind chimes. It floats through the air and uses its cries for communication. Chimecho is known for its healing and calming abilities.

midday form lycanroc.name: Midday Form Lycanroc
midday form lycanroc.description: Lycanroc, the evolved form of Rockruff, has Midday, Midnight, and Dusk forms, each with distinct characteristics and abilities. Lycanroc is known for its quick movements and combative nature.

falinks.name: Falinks
falinks.description: Falinks, a Fighting type Pokémon, is a formation of six small creatures. They march together and are known for their teamwork and coordination. Falinks is often found in rugged terrain, moving as a disciplined unit.

manectric.name: Manectric
manectric.description: Manectric, the evolved form of Electrike, is an Electric type Pokémon. It's known for its speed and the mane of electricity it generates. Manectric can control lightning and is often seen during lightning storms.

slowbro.name: Slowbro
slowbro.description: Slowbro, the evolved form of Slowpoke, is a Water/Psychic type Pokémon. It has a Shellder latched onto its tail, which triggers a transformation. Slowbro stands upright and gains enhanced psychic powers and a more focused demeanor.

aegislash.name: Aegislash
aegislash.description: Aegislash, the final evolution of Honedge, is a Steel/Ghost type Pokémon. It can change forms between Shield and Blade, altering its offensive and defensive capabilities. Aegislash is known for its ability to use both tactics and strategy in battle.

feraligatr.name: Feraligatr
feraligatr.description: Feraligatr, the final evolution of Totodile, is a Water type Pokémon. It's large and intimidating, with immense power. Feraligatr can move quickly in water and uses its powerful jaws to defeat its enemies.

medicham.name: Medicham
medicham.description: Medicham, the evolved form of Meditite, is a Fighting/Psychic type Pokémon. It achieves high levels of spiritual power and can predict its opponent's movements. Medicham can use psychokinetic powers in battle.

starmie.name: Starmie
starmie.description: Starmie, the evolved form of Staryu, is a Water/Psychic type Pokémon. It has a jewel core that shines with seven colors. Starmie is faster and more powerful than Staryu and can emit powerful psychic waves.

jolteon.name: Jolteon
jolteon.description: Jolteon, another evolution of Eevee, is an Electric type Pokémon. It's covered in spiky fur that can shoot out electric needles. Jolteon is incredibly fast and can generate powerful electric charges.

victreebel.name: Victreebel
victreebel.description: Victreebel, the final form of Bellsprout, is a Grass/Poison type Pokémon. It has a large, bell-shaped head with a gaping mouth. Victreebel lures prey with its sweet aroma, then swallows it whole and dissolves it with acidic digestive juices.

zoroark.name: Zoroark
zoroark.description: Zoroark, the evolved form of Zorua, is a Dark type Pokémon. It's more powerful and skilled in creating complex illusions. Zoroark is protective of its pack and is known for its cunning and deceptive abilities.

castform.name: Castform
castform.description: Castform, a Normal type Pokémon, has the unique ability to change its form based on the weather. It can transform into its Sunny, Rainy, or Snowy Form, altering its type to Fire, Water, or Ice respectively.

torkoal.name: Torkoal
torkoal.description: Torkoal, a Fire type Pokémon, exhales black smoke and soot from its nostrils and back. It's known for its coal-filled shell, which it burns for energy. Torkoal is often found in coal mines and mountains.

spiritomb.name: Spiritomb
spiritomb.description: Spiritomb, a Ghost/Dark type Pokémon, is formed by 108 spirits bound to a fissure in an Odd Keystone. It's mischievous and sometimes malevolent. Spiritomb is said to have been formed as punishment for misdeeds 500 years ago.

delphox.name: Delphox
delphox.description: Delphox, the final evolution of Fennekin, is a Fire/Psychic type Pokémon. It resembles a mage and uses a branch as a wand to cast fire spells. Delphox is known for its mystical and enigmatic nature.

ninetales.name: Ninetales
ninetales.description: Ninetales, the evolved form of Vulpix, is a Fire type Pokémon. It has a majestic appearance with nine long, flowing tails. Ninetales is enveloped in an aura of mystery and is said to live for a thousand years, each tail possessing its own unique power.

chesnaught.name: Chesnaught
chesnaught.description: Chesnaught, the final evolution of Chespin, is a Grass/Fighting type Pokémon. It's extremely protective and can generate a shield to protect itself and others. Chesnaught is known for its courage and strength.

aurorus.name: Aurorus
aurorus.description: Aurorus, the evolved form of Amaura, is a Rock/Ice type Pokémon. It's large and elegant, with a long neck and a crystalline frill. Aurorus can create freezing air and dazzling auroras.

politoed.name: Politoed
politoed.description: Politoed, an alternate evolution of Poliwhirl, is a Water type Pokémon. It's known for its cheerful and boisterous nature. Politoed has a swirl on its belly and a crown-like structure on its head.

weavile.name: Weavile
weavile.description: Weavile, a Dark/Ice type Pokémon, is the evolved form of Sneasel. It's cunning and quick, with sharp claws that are effective both in battle and for climbing icy surfaces. Weavile is known for its pack behavior and nocturnal habits.

simipour.name: Simipour
simipour.description: Simipour, the evolved form of Panpour, is a Water type Pokémon. It's more playful and has a carefree attitude. Simipour is known for its ability to manipulate water and its agile swimming.

krookodile.name: Krookodile
krookodile.description: Krookodile, the final evolution of Sandile, is a Ground/Dark type Pokémon. It's large and intimidating, with formidable jaws and keen eyesight. Krookodile is known for its aggression and its ability to crush opponents.

leafeon.name: Leafeon
leafeon.description: Leafeon, an evolution of Eevee, is a Grass type Pokémon. It's known for its close connection to nature and its ability to perform photosynthesis. Leafeon is peaceful and often found in lush forests.

audino.name: Audino
audino.description: Audino, a Normal type Pokémon, has large ears and a caring nature. It's known for its ability to heal wounds using its feelers. Audino is often sought after by Trainers for its support abilities in battle.

raichu.name: Raichu
raichu.description: Raichu, the evolved form of Pikachu, is an Electric type Pokémon. It has a more robust and mature appearance than Pikachu and can discharge more powerful electric attacks. Raichu's tail acts as a grounding rod to protect it from its own high voltage power.

pyroar.name: Pyroar
pyroar.description: Pyroar, the evolved form of Litleo, is a Fire/Normal type Pokémon. It resembles a majestic lion and has a flaming mane. Pyroar is known for its power and its regal presence, commanding respect from others.

meganium.name: Meganium
meganium.description: Meganium, the final evolution of Chikorita, is a Grass type Pokémon. It has large petals around its neck and emits a soothing fragrance that can revive dead plants. Meganium's breath has the power to bring back life.

altaria.name: Altaria
altaria.description: Altaria, the evolved form of Swablu, is a Dragon/Flying type Pokémon. It sings in a beautiful, humming voice and is known for its graceful flight. Altaria dances and spins among the clouds.

gardevoir.name: Gardevoir
gardevoir.description: Gardevoir, l'evoluzione di Kirlia, è un Pokémon di tipo Psico/Fata. È protettivo e fedele, e può creare piccoli buchi neri usando la sua energia psichica. Gardevoir è devoto al suo allenatore.

malamar.name: Malamar
malamar.description: Malamar, the evolved form of Inkay, is a Dark/Psychic type Pokémon. It has strong hypnotic powers and can manipulate both Pokémon and humans. Malamar is known for its intelligence and its ability to invert its body.

sableye.name: Sableye
sableye.description: Sableye, a Dark/Ghost type Pokémon, is known for its gemstone eyes. It dwells in caves and feeds on minerals. Sableye is mischievous and is said to bring bad luck to those who see it at night.

musharna.name: Musharna
musharna.description: Musharna, the evolved form of Munna, is a Psychic type Pokémon. It's larger and emits a dream mist from its forehead. Musharna is known for its ability to create vivid dreams and its calming presence.

glaceon.name: Glaceon
glaceon.description: Glaceon, another evolution of Eevee, is an Ice type Pokémon. It can freeze the air around it to create ice crystals. Glaceon is known for its beauty and its ability to control its body temperature.

liepard.name: Liepard
liepard.description: Liepard, the evolved form of Purrloin, is a Dark type Pokémon. It's sleek and stealthy, with a leopard-like appearance. Liepard is known for its speed and agility, making it a formidable hunter.

goodra.name: Goodra
goodra.description: Goodra, the final evolution of Goomy, is a Dragon type Pokémon. It's incredibly friendly and affectionate. Goodra has a slimy, mucus-like body that can dissolve anything and is known for its powerful hug.

aggron.name: Aggron
aggron.description: Aggron, the final evolution of Aron, is a Steel/Rock type Pokémon. It's known for its formidable armor and strength. Aggron claims a large mountain as its territory and fiercely defends it from intruders.

simisage.name: Simisage
simisage.description: Simisage, the evolved form of Pansage, is a Grass type Pokémon. It's more aggressive and has a punk-like appearance. Simisage is known for its quick movements and its ability to throw seeds at high speed.

emboar.name: Emboar
emboar.description: Emboar, the final evolution of Tepig, is a Fire/Fighting type Pokémon. It's large and powerful, with flames emanating from its chin and shoulders. Emboar is fierce in battle and can shoot fire from its arms.

talonflame.name: Talonflame
talonflame.description: Talonflame, the final evolution of Fletchling, is a Fire/Flying type Pokémon. It's incredibly fast and can dive at speeds over 310 mph. Talonflame is known for its aerial acrobatics and its fiery attacks.

ampharos.name: Ampharos
ampharos.description: Ampharos, the final evolution of Mareep, is an Electric type Pokémon. It has a light on its tail that can be seen from far away. Ampharos is known for its majestic appearance and the bright light it emits.

banette.name: Banette
banette.description: Banette, the evolved form of Shuppet, is a Ghost type Pokémon. It's a discarded doll seeking revenge on its former owner. Banette is known for its powerful grudge and its ability to generate energy for curses.

charizard.name: Charizard
charizard.description: Charizard, the final form of Charmander, is a Fire/Flying type Pokémon. It is one of the most recognizable Pokémon from Generation 1, with its large wings and the ability to breathe intense flames. Charizard's fearsome and majestic appearance, combined with its ability to fly and unleash powerful fire-based attacks, make it a highly sought-after Pokémon for any trainer's team.

lucario.name: Lucario
lucario.description: Lucario, the evolved form of Riolu, is a Fighting/Steel type Pokémon. It can sense and control Aura, a special energy emitted by all living things. Lucario is known for its sense of justice and its martial arts skills.

samurott.name: Samurott
samurott.description: Samurott, the final evolution of Oshawott, is a Water type Pokémon. It's a samurai-like Pokémon with a powerful and noble presence. Samurott wields seamitars and is highly skilled in swordsmanship.

alakazam.name: Alakazam
alakazam.description: Alakazam, the final evolution of Abra, is a Psychic type Pokémon. It has an extremely high IQ and formidable psychic abilities. Alakazam's brain continually grows, making it smarter every day, and it can remember everything.

ariados.name: Ariados
ariados.description: Ariados, the evolved form of Spinarak, is a Bug/Poison type Pokémon. It's larger and more menacing, with longer legs. Ariados can spin webs to trap prey and can even travel on its threads.

alcremie.name: Alcremie
alcremie.description: Alcremie, the evolved form of Milcery, is a Fairy type Pokémon. It resembles a cake and can create whipped cream. Alcremie is known for its delightful appearance and its ability to calm and soothe others.

heliolisk.name: Heliolisk
heliolisk.description: Heliolisk, the evolved form of Helioptile, is an Electric/Normal type Pokémon. It can generate powerful electricity and is known for its speed. Heliolisk uses its frill to absorb sunlight and intimidate opponents.

flareon.name: Flareon
flareon.description: Flareon, another evolution of Eevee, is a Fire type Pokémon. It has a fluffy coat and a bushy tail. Flareon can exhale fire with a temperature of over 3,000 degrees Fahrenheit.

arcanine.name: Arcanine
arcanine.description: Arcanine, the evolved form of Growlithe, is a Fire type Pokémon. It has a majestic, lion-like appearance and is known for its speed and powerful fire attacks. Arcanine is revered in many cultures for its beauty and strength.

barbaracle.name: Barbaracle
barbaracle.description: Barbaracle, the evolved form of Binacle, is a Rock/Water type Pokémon. It has multiple limbs and faces, each with its own consciousness. Barbaracle is known for its brute strength and its ability to break through solid rock.

froslass.name: Froslass
froslass.description: Froslass, an evolution of female Snorunt, is an Ice/Ghost type Pokémon. It's known for its chilling beauty and its ability to freeze foes with its breath. Froslass is often found in snowy areas, luring travelers.

blastoise.name: Blastoise
blastoise.description: Blastoise, the final evolution of Squirtle, is a Water type Pokémon known for the large, powerful cannons on its back. These cannons can shoot water with enough force to punch through thick steel, making Blastoise a formidable opponent in battle. Its bulky, armored appearance gives it a commanding presence.

sceptile.name: Sceptile
sceptile.description: Sceptile, l'evoluzione finale di Treecko, è un Pokémon di tipo Erba. Ha una coda folta e foglie affilate come lame. Sceptile può rilasciare potenti attacchi di tipo Erba e ha un legame profondo con la natura.

golurk.name: Golurk
golurk.description: Golurk, the evolved form of Golett, is a Ground/Ghost type Pokémon. It's larger and resembles a giant golem. Golurk can fly by retracting its legs and arms, and is known for its immense strength.

cofagrigus.name: Cofagrigus
cofagrigus.description: Cofagrigus, the evolved form of Yamask, is a Ghost type Pokémon. It resembles an Egyptian sarcophagus and is known to swallow those who get too close, turning them into mummies. Cofagrigus is often found guarding ancient tombs.

eelektross.name: Eelektross
eelektross.description: Eelektross, the final evolution of Tynamo, is an Electric type Pokémon. It has a lamprey-like appearance and can move on land using its tentacles. Eelektross is known for its powerful electric shocks and its lack of weaknesses due to its Levitate ability.

venusaur.name: Venusaur
venusaur.description: Venusaur, the final evolution of Bulbasaur, is a large, quadruped Pokémon with a Grass/Poison typing. Introduced in Generation 1, it boasts a massive flower on its back, which is capable of absorbing vast amounts of sunlight and using it for powerful solar-based attacks. Venusaur's imposing presence and ability to affect weather conditions with its flower make it a formidable opponent in battles.

klefki.name: Klefki
klefki.description: Klefki, a Steel/Fairy type Pokémon, resembles a key ring and collects keys. It's known for its mischievous behavior of stealing keys. Klefki uses its ability to unlock anything as a means of protection.

drampa.name: Drampa
drampa.description: Drampa, a Normal/Dragon type Pokémon, is gentle and friendly to children but fierce when angered. It's known for its long neck and ability to control its breath to unleash powerful attacks. Drampa is often found in the mountains.

dragalge.name: Dragalge
dragalge.description: Dragalge, the evolved form of Skrelp, is a Poison/Dragon type Pokémon. It's known for its potent poison and its ability to live in both the sea and on land. Dragalge is often found in shipwrecks and underwater ruins.

crabominable.name: Crabominable
crabominable.description: Crabominable, the evolved form of Crabrawler, is a Fighting/Ice type Pokémon. It resembles a yeti crab and is known for its powerful punches. Crabominable is found in cold, snowy mountains and has a shaggy appearance.

heracross.name: Heracross
heracross.description: Heracross, a Bug/Fighting type Pokémon, has a large horn that it uses to throw its enemies. It's known for its strength and is often found in forests, where it feeds on tree sap.

pidgeot.name: Pidgeot
pidgeot.description: Pidgeot, the final evolution of Pidgey, is a Normal/Flying type Pokémon. It has a striking appearance with a colorful crest of feathers and a sleek design. Pidgeot can fly at Mach speeds, creating gusts of wind strong enough to bend trees.

pinsir.name: Pinsir
pinsir.description: Pinsir, a Bug type Pokémon, has powerful pincers on its head. It can crush and lift heavy objects with ease. Pinsir is aggressive and will charge at foes, using its pincers to grip and toss them.

sharpedo.name: Sharpedo
sharpedo.description: Sharpedo, the evolved form of Carvanha, is a Water/Dark type Pokémon. It resembles a torpedo and is incredibly fast. Sharpedo is feared as the "bully of the sea" and can ram through iron plates.

meowstic (male).name: Meowstic (Male)
meowstic (male).description: Meowstic, the evolved form of Espurr, is a Psychic type Pokémon. It has different appearances based on its gender. Meowstic can exert powerful psychic energy and is known for its protective instincts.

camerupt.name: Camerupt
camerupt.description: Camerupt, the evolved form of Numel, is a Fire/Ground type Pokémon. It has two volcanoes on its back that erupt violently. Camerupt is known for its explosive nature and the lava it spews.

steelix.name: Steelix
steelix.description: Steelix, the evolved form of Onix, is a Steel/Ground type Pokémon. It's incredibly hard and can burrow through the ground at over 50 mph. Steelix's body is harder than any metal and can withstand high temperatures.

houndoom.name: Houndoom
houndoom.description: Houndoom, the evolved form of Houndour, is a Dark/Fire type Pokémon. It's more menacing and has a pair of long horns. Houndoom's howl is said to curse those who hear it, and its flames are toxic.

absol.name: Absol
absol.description: Absol, a Dark type Pokémon, is known as the disaster Pokémon. It has the ability to sense natural disasters and tries to warn people. Absol is often misunderstood and blamed for the disasters it predicts.

beedrill.name: Beedrill
beedrill.description: Beedrill, the final form of Weedle, is a Bug/Poison type Pokémon. It resembles a large, menacing wasp with three sharp stingers – two on its forelimbs and one on its tail. Known for its aggressive nature, Beedrill is swift and excels in group attacks, overwhelming foes with coordinated strikes.
